data.body:
## Description

**What**: Add JSONL logging of centrality decisions to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-log.jsonl. Each staged file produces one JSON line recording the file path, centrality score, threshold, and decision taken.

**Why**: Operators need visibility into why the test gate chose full suite vs associated tests for a given changeset. Structured logs enable threshold tuning and post-mortem analysis.

**Scope**:
- IN: JSONL logging to centrality-log.jsonl, one line per staged file, append behavior
- OUT: Log analysis tooling, log visualization, log rotation

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, record-test-status.sh logs centrality decisions to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-log.jsonl with {file, centrality_score, threshold, decision} per staged file, where decision is one of: associated_only, full_suite_centrality, full_suite_file_count, skipped_no_sg
  ← Satisfies: "record-test-status.sh logs centrality decisions to centrality-log.jsonl"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- None additional
